specific_mechanism: HOPF-LR: Hopf-bifurcation diagnostic for learning-rate schedule
llm_application: Monitor training trajectory; detect proximity to Hopf bifurcation (eigenvalue pair crossing imaginary axis); reduce learning rate when entering oscillatory regime.
novelty_claim: Existing LR schedules (cosine, warmup) are pre-defined. HOPF-LR uses dynamical-systems eigenvalue diagnostic to adaptively damp.
